name: HR_GEN_AI_PROMPTS_SEED_B
description: This table stores the seeded prompts.

columns.Name: PROMPT_TMPL_AI_ID
columns.Comments: This column uniquely a seeded prompt version.

columns.Name: BO_HIERARCHY_CLASSPATH
columns.Comments: This column contains the java classpath that contains Business Objects registered for the prompt

columns.Name: PROMPT_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for prompts

columns.Name: PROMPT_TMPL
columns.Comments: This column contains the prompt text including any substitution variables to be replaced at runtime.

columns.Name: PROMPT_TMPL_VERSION
columns.Comments: This column indicates the prompt design version.

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the prompt design version is enabled for use.

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: Oracle product family to which the prompt belongs to

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Oracle product  to which the prompt belongs to

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: USE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: AI usecase id

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: PROMPT
columns.Comments: Contains the seeded prompt

columns.Name: MODEL_CODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the LLM model code.

columns.Name: MODEL_VERSION
columns.Comments: This column indicates the LLM model version.

columns.Name: MODEL_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: This column indicates the LLM model provider.

columns.Name: CONFIGURABLE
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the prompt is configurable.

columns.Name: PERSIST_DATA
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the prompt data can be persisted.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_OPT_IN
columns.Comments: This column indicates the completion language opt-in.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: AVAILABLE_TOKENS
columns.Comments: List of tokens which can be used when its being overridden

columns.Name: EXTRA_PROPERTIES
columns.Comments: Additional JSON sent with the LLM request (used for resource selectors)
